---
title: "Bags over time"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "bags_over_time")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Bundle loader — reads the RDS bundle once, then extracts datasets by key
.load_bundle <- function(bundle_file, key) {
  if (!exists('.dashboardr_bundle_cache', inherits = FALSE))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache <<- list()
  if (is.null(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]]))
    .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]] <<- readRDS(bundle_file)
  if (!(key %in% names(.dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]])))
    stop("Bundle key '", key, "' not found in ", bundle_file, call. = FALSE)
  .dashboardr_bundle_cache[[bundle_file]][[key]]
}

# Load multiple datasets

# Load data_1
data_1 <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'data_1_12obs.rds')
cat('data_1 loaded:', nrow(data_1), 'rows,', ncol(data_1), 'columns\n')

# Load data_2
data_2 <- .load_bundle('dashboard_data_bundle.rds', 'dataset_small_322obs.rds')
cat('data_2 loaded:', nrow(data_2), 'rows,', ncol(data_2), 'columns\n')

```

## Total bags over time

```{r timeline-total-bags-kiln-id}
# Total bags over time
result <- viz_timeline(
  data = data_2,
  title = "Total bags over time",
  time_var = "month",
  y_var = "total_bags",
  agg = "sum",
  group_var = "kiln_id"
)

result
```
